hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'api/v1alpha1/.*\.go' && ! echo "$file" | grep -q 'zz_generated'; then echo 'Reminder: api/v1alpha1/ types changed — run: make generate && make manifests'; fi
